ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Final Accounting For The Former Executor.
Off Calendar Jun-14-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Final Accounting For The Former Executor.
Off Calendar Apr-19-2023 Continued To Jun-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mitchell Steinberger appeared by courtcall for James Leestma (petitioner).

Mr. Steinberger stated that he did not have a chance to see the tentative ruling. The court stated that there is the issue of the division of the statutory fees of 80% to Mr. Leestma and 20% to the former administrator's heirs, that it needs written consent from the heirs so that there's no issue, and that it needs clarification as to the payment amount ($9,600.00 or $9,900.00) to Advance LLC. Status of the final accounting for the former administrator is continued to June 14, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel is to file the consents, and something regarding Lynda Ryan's share by June 7, 2023.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES: See Mini-minutes this date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Singh. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-03-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steffanie Stelnick, Esq., counsel for James Leestma, Petitioner (appearing by video conference)

The Court notes the matter before the Court, to wit: a petition for appointment of successor administrator, occasioned by the death of the former administrator. The Court notes that notice of the proceedings appears to be complete and that no objection has been made to the Petition. The Court grants the Petition, appointing James Leestma the Successor Administrator with full authority under the Independent Administration of Estates Act. Bond is set at $805,000.00. Frank Mahoney is to remain as Probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for hearing on October 23, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Status for the final accounting for the former administrator is set for December 19, 2022.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Singh. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

Off Calendar Jun-15-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-15-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The court summarizes the current status of this matter and of the death of the Administrator. The court points to the Petition to Appoint Successor Personal Representative currently set in this matter for Jul-06-2022 and sets a Status on Close of Estate for the same date. The Petition for Final Distribution set for hearing today is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Martinez. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar May-24-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-04-2022 Continued To Jun-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steffanie Stelnick, via CourtCall, for William E. Sims, deceased Administrator.

The court advises that this matter requires an appointment of a successor Administrator. Counsel reports that she is considering filing a petition to appoint decedent's wife as successor Administrator and confirms that no estate has been filed for the decedent.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Jun-15-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status of Appointment of Successor Administrator is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Andam. Not Reported. ? ?
